Class SocialNetwork

java.lang.Object
model.SocialNetwork
public class SocialNetwork extends Object
Stores users and undirected friendships, with secondary indexes for workplace and hometown searches.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    SocialNetwork()
    Creates an empty social network.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    addFriendship(String userId1, String userId2)
    Adds an undirected friendship between two existing users.

    Adds a user and updates the attribute indexes.
    void
    clear()
    Removes all users, friendships, and index entries.
    boolean

    Tests whether a user ID exists.
    Collection<User>

    Returns a read-only view of all users.
    User

    Looks up a user by ID.

    getUsersByHometown(String hometown)
    Finds users whose hometown matches case-insensitively.
    Set<User>

    Finds users whose workplace matches case-insensitively.
    boolean
    removeFriendship(String userId1, String userId2)
    Removes an undirected friendship between two existing users.

    Updates a user's profile and keeps the secondary indexes synchronized.

  • Constructor Details

    • SocialNetwork

      public SocialNetwork()
      Creates an empty social network.

  • Method Details

    • addUser

      public boolean addUser(User user)
      Adds a user and updates the attribute indexes.
      Parameters:
      user - user to add
      Returns:
      true when the user was added; false for a null user, null ID, or duplicate ID

    • getUser

      public User getUser(String userId)
      Looks up a user by ID.
      Parameters:
      userId - user identifier
      Returns:
      the matching user, or null when absent

    • containsUser

      public boolean containsUser(String userId)
      Tests whether a user ID exists.
      Parameters:
      userId - user identifier
      Returns:
      true when the ID is registered

    • getAllUsers

      public Collection<User> getAllUsers()
      Returns a read-only view of all users.
      Returns:
      all registered users

    • getUsersByWorkplace

      public Set<User> getUsersByWorkplace(String workplace)
      Finds users whose workplace matches case-insensitively.
      Parameters:
      workplace - workplace to search for
      Returns:
      matching users, or an empty set

    • getUsersByHometown

      public Set<User> getUsersByHometown(String hometown)
      Finds users whose hometown matches case-insensitively.
      Parameters:
      hometown - hometown to search for
      Returns:
      matching users, or an empty set

    • updateUserProfile

      public boolean updateUserProfile(String userId, String name, String workplace, String hometown)
      Updates a user's profile and keeps the secondary indexes synchronized.
      Parameters:
      userId - user identifier
      name - new display name
      workplace - new workplace
      hometown - new hometown
      Returns:
      true when the user exists and was updated

    • addFriendship

      public boolean addFriendship(String userId1, String userId2)
      Adds an undirected friendship between two existing users.
      Parameters:
      userId1 - first user ID
      userId2 - second user ID
      Returns:
      true when both users exist and the operation was applied

    • removeFriendship

      public boolean removeFriendship(String userId1, String userId2)
      Removes an undirected friendship between two existing users.
      Parameters:
      userId1 - first user ID
      userId2 - second user ID
      Returns:
      true when both users exist and the operation was applied

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Removes all users, friendships, and index entries.
